author: dabravin
description: Embed snippets, templates and any linkable by delegating the current scope to the embedded file, treating it as content instead of a reference.
name: Dynamic Embed

releases.author: dabravin
releases.description:
Changing markdown conversion to blocking call
Embedded file reading is now using the cachedRead API method
Added an error case for non-markdown embedded files
Update of usage doc, not supporting links to blocks in files
General code refactoring and improving readability and quality

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dabravin/obsidian-dynamic-embed/compare/1.0.2...1.1.0

releases.author: dabravin
releases.description:
Change link retrieval method from all files -> filter to API method getFirstLinkpathDest

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dybrawin/obsidian-dynamic-embed/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: dabravin
releases.description:
Pilot release, basic functionality validated

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dybrawin/obsidian-dynamic-embed/commits/1.0.1
